override_confirmation: V07b retains every V07a priority decision. HK239HG Class CW10 lessons 2 and 4 remain rejected on their original dates because confirmed YMCA SEN cannot be replaced. Garett supplied eight possible 0900-1200 replacement dates: 2026-08-24, 2026-08-26, 2026-08-29, 2026-09-05, 2026-09-07, 2026-09-09, 2026-09-10 and 2026-09-12. They are not confirmed lessons and are excluded from salary.
